message:
web: Replace Streamdown with react-markdown for SSR compatibility

- Use react-markdown + remark-gfm instead of Streamdown (no new Function())
- Add custom typography.css based on Streamdown styles
- Use @pierre/diffs File component for code block syntax highlighting
- Remove @tailwindcss/typography plugin in favor of custom styles

Fixes markdown flicker on page load since react-markdown works in
Cloudflare Workers SSR without falling back to client rendering.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/fvaiz8opwl
